messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0032",
  "title": "中国移动游戏市场新品收入占比",
  "page_index": 11,
  "page_range": "11"
}

Section text:
## 中国移动游戏市场新品收入占比

message.content: This section addresses the proportion of total revenue generated by newly released mobile games within China's mobile gaming market. It can answer questions regarding the financial contribution of new titles, market performance trends for recent launches, and revenue distribution dynamics between new and existing products. Key entities include China's mobile game industry and newly launched mobile games. The primary metric covered is revenue share (percentage). The section is structured to present quantitative evidence, likely in the form of statistical tables, charts, or trend figures, though specific numerical values, dates, definitions, procedures, or analytical claims are not included in the provided text. It serves as a reference for market analysis, industry reporting, and performance benchmarking of new mobile game releases.
